svg.text: AI Assurance Platform — Azure Reference Architecture
aigovern.sandboxhub.co · Single-tenant v1 · rg-aigovern-dev (eastus) · SWAs in eastus2
Microsoft Azure · Subscription: SignalLayerDev · Resource group: rg-aigovern-dev

g.text: Linux · Python 3.12 · B1 · custom domain aigovern.sandboxhub.co
① HMACAuthMiddleware · gates /api/sdk/* · ±300s drift · nonce TTL 600s
② RequestContextMiddleware · X-Request-Id · role / request_id ContextVar
③ DataModeMiddleware · X-Data-Mode v1/v2 · filters by data_source (S52)
scrub_pii MUST run before trace_call — hard invariant
OPA fail-closed policy engine · in-proc Python fallback
Llama Guard 3 · NeMo topic rails · injection detection
App Service local disk · JSONL via storage.py

svg.text: Observability & Governance · all engine telemetry flows down into this layer

g.text: ✓ Single-tenant v1 · dev build (no KV, no MI, no VNet)
✓ FastAPI engine on App Service Linux B1 · Python 3.12
✓ Two Preact SPAs on Static Web Apps (eastus2, Free)
✓ JSONL-primary storage; PG + AI Search optional
✓ Per-system HMAC SDK keys (S53) with legacy fallback
✓ Scrubbed-only egress to external LLM / observability
✓ CI: GitHub Actions OIDC → App Service · SHA verify
• Scrubber runs BEFORE tracer/Langfuse — hard rule
Edge / SPA: Static Web Apps · eastus2
Engine: App Service Linux B1 · eastus
T3 RAG: Azure AI Search · optional
